assistant: Thank you for your patience. I now have all the information to help you with your requests: 1. Regarding T-shirt options: We currently have 12 T-shirt variants with different combinations of: - Colors: blue, purple, red, and black - Sizes: S, M, L, XL, and XXL - Materials: cotton and polyester - Styles: crew neck and v-neck Of these 12 variants, 10 are currently available for purchase. 2. Regarding your return request for a cleaner, headphones, and a smart watch: I found these items in your order #W2378156, which has been delivered: - Vacuum Cleaner (item ID: 4602305039) - Headphones (item ID: 4202497723) - Smart Watch (item ID: 9408160950) Would you like to proceed with returning these three items? If so, I'll need your confirmation to process the return, and I'll need to know which payment method you'd like to use for the refund. Based on your account, you have a Mastercard ending in 2478 available.
user: Yes, I’d like to go ahead and return all three items. Please process the refund to my Mastercard ending in 2478. Let me know if you need anything else from me to complete the return.

candidate_answers.text: Thanks for confirming. I have the items and refund method on file, so I can process the return request now.
The user has already specified which delivered items to return and the refund destination, and has now given explicit approval, so the next grounded move is to execute the return.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a retail turn where the user gives final approval to return multiple delivered items after the order and refund method have already been established.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from visible state. The top score reflects direct operational execution of the confirmed return rather than repeated discovery work.
notes: This sample diversifies retail by using a simple affirmation query with substantial prior state.
The t-shirt catalog lookup remains in history_summary because it is part of the visible multi-intent conversation.
best_action is return_delivered_order_items because the user has already chosen return, not exchange or cancellation.
